chapter_title.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Amr Ibn Khalid

text: و ما كان فيه عن عمرو بن خالد فقد رويته عن أبي- رضي اللّه عنه- عن سعد ابن عبد اللّه، عن الهيثم بن أبي مسروق النّهديّ، عن الحسين بن علوان، عن عمرو بن خالد.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Everything in this book that is narrated from Amr ibn Khalid has been transmitted by me from my father - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Sad ibn Abdullah, from Al-Haytham ibn Abi Masruq Al-Nahdi, from Al-Husayn ibn Alwan, from Amr ibn Khalid.
